headline: Take Two Interactive Software (TTWO) Stock Could Be Fully Priced Following GTA VI Pre Order Buzz
summary: After a strong three year run, Take-Two Interactive Software now sits in a tricky spot where its Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate looks close to the market price, while market based valuation multiples suggest the stock is priced at a premium rather than as a clear bargain. Take-Two Interactive Software has returned 71.0% over three years, which puts extra pressure on current buyers to justify paying up at today’s levels. The upcoming Grand Theft Auto VI release and...
